title: Tech stocks tumble on concerns over AI spending
description: A sudden wave of selling in major tech shares triggers doubt over the sustainability of the AI boom.
content:
Financial markets received a sharp wake-up call on Tuesday following a sudden wave of selling in major technology shares, triggering widespread doubt over the sustainability of the AI boom.

title: US stocks plunge in global tech rout
description: Stock markets have slumped on Wall Street as a global tech rout gathers pace.
content:

title: Do not travel warnings issued as heatwave sends Britain into meltdown

title: Serpentine Summer party best
description: Despite London’s heatwave, guests braved leather and fur for one of the big social events of the summer
content:
The Serpentine Summer Party is always one of the biggest moments of the London summer social season. Back in 1994, Princess Diana famously appeared at the event in her ‘revenge dress’.
